title: glycosmis tomentella
intro: Glycosmis tomentella, also known as the hairy boxwood or hairy glycosmis, is a species of plant in the Rutaceae family native to tropical Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, fever, and various skin conditions. The health benefits associated with Glycosmis tomentella include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which can aid in reducing inflammation, preventing infections, and promoting wound healing. Glycosmis tomentella can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
